title: sorghum pusillum
intro: Sorghum pusillum, also known as yellow foxtail grass, is a small annual grass species native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sorghum pusillum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Sorghum pusillum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
